offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inconsistent equipment maintenance causes unexpected downtime. We provide a scheduling system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent equipment maintenance schedules lead to unexpected downtime.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors

DM outreach to contractors with demo video

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
